title: Run CJK localized UI HIG gate
summary: Ran the HIG localized UI gate for ja, ko, zh-Hans, zh-Hant under the internal-reviewer signoff baseline. Doc-only intake: source-trace inspection + multisurface-harness dry-run validation (28 captures planned, idb ready). Result: fail because no preserved screenshots. Allocated HIG-JA-001 (major / adaptive-layout / open) for Japanese Train tab katakana label 'トレーニング' (6 chars; CJK ~2x Latin width). Korean / Simplified Chinese / Traditional Chinese have uniformly compact 1-2 ideograph tab labels and no source-level HIG risk.

translation_quality_risks_noted_not_hig_: ja: katakana loanwords (トレーニング, キャリア, ホーム, キャンセル) are valid but native reviewer could prefer kanji alternatives
ko: '쓰기' for Write is noun form; '작성' is alternative
Simplified vs Traditional Chinese differences require separate native review (do not bulk-edit one into the other)
gate_outcome.harness_plan_dry_run_status: planned (28 captures, idb + idb_companion ready; no --label-overrides needed)

not_claimed: any of these 4 CJK locales is hig-ui-reviewed
any of these 4 CJK locales is native-reviewed
translation quality for any of these 4 CJK locales
screenshot-reviewed, device-verified, or testflight-verified for any of these 4 CJK locales
residual_risk: HIG-JA-001 is a source-trace inference. Whether the katakana tab label actually truncates depends on iPhone width + Dynamic Type; needs screenshot confirmation.
ko/zh-Hans/zh-Hant have no recorded HIG finding only because no screenshots were captured. Live screenshots may surface additional issues (e.g., line-breaking in long count/date phrases).
Japanese katakana-vs-kanji choice is a native-review decision; HIG gate noted but did not override.
Eight bucket-gate findings total now share the same tab-bar truncation fix shape (HIG-DE-002/FR-001/JA-001/NL-001/RU-001/TR-001/UK-001 are the seven adaptive-layout findings; HIG-DE-001 is separate).
downstream_recommendations: Schedule one screenshot-capture slice that covers all 17 non-English locales now in failing-bucket-gate state and confirms/denies the seven tab-truncation findings + HIG-DE-001's reflection-nudge fix.
If the seven tab-truncation findings are confirmed by screenshot, queue a single tab-bar layout slice (likely under Features/, not within a localization slice) that addresses all of them together.
